node.title: UBER + Media.net interview this Monday + Needed Study/Interview prep Group

article.title: UBER + Media.net interview this Monday + Needed Study/Interview prep Group
article.content:
Hey everyone,
I am expecting first round of interviews at Uber and Media.net coming Monday. The role is for machine learning 2 position and the these round will mostly cover DSA and Algorithm. Can you guys please help me what to expect in this?? Particularly for UBER, it would be BPS interview(don't know what does that mean but still), please help me with any leads if possible. For media.net, they haven't told me specifically about it but I am expecting it would be some hard kind of questions.
`[EDIT]`
I am also looking for peer group where we can interview each other with topics ranging from ML(NLP, Recommendation,+others) and DSA. If you are interested and preparing for interviews, we can connect.

post.content: You can join whatsapp group https://chat.whatsapp.com/HFxef40dCqJ20bfx8UApUw\n\nI am also finding serious study mates.
Hi, I am also being considered for SDE 2 role at Media.net \nCould you share your experience for the same?\nPlus, count me in for the group. How can I join?
BPS round basically phone screen round. You can expect medium-hard leetcode questions.\nThough I\'m junior, we may connect for ML and DSA prep
No idea for this particular one, but if u don\'t mind we can connect maybe!
